{"text": "1. Lift your upper torso to contract abdominal muscles.
2. Lift your right leg and bend your knee to right angle.
3. Point your hands at bended knee height. Don't use hands to hold lifted leg.
4. Hold still for 3 seconds.
5. Return to the starting position.
6. {"text": "1. Lift your upper torso to contract abdominal muscles.
2. Lift your right leg and bend your knee to right angle.
3. Point your hands at bended knee height. Don't use hands to hold lifted leg.
4. Hold still for 3 seconds.
5. Return to the starting position.
6. Repeat the exercise with the other leg.", "resource-id": "com.caynax.a6w:id/xiesttsrdDtaimmg_oettcicecdu", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "com.caynax.view.text.TextViewExtended", "bounds": [56, 1085, 1384, 1623], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Exercise demo", "resource-id": "com.caynax.a6w:id/xiesttsrdDtaimmg_mtoDpmb", "ancestors": ["android.widget.Button", "android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatButton", "bounds": [492, 1679, 947, 1847], "componentLabel": "Text Button"}]}
